message:
test(cli): add TypeScript CLI parity tests validating all shared
flags, short flags, subcommands, and @file expansion (DROPIN-141)

6 new tests ensuring Rust CLI parser accepts every flag from the
TypeScript CLI's args.ts:

- ts_parity_all_shared_flags_parse: exercises --provider, --model,
  --api-key, --system-prompt, --append-system-prompt, --continue,
  --session, --session-dir, --no-session, --mode, --print, --verbose,
  --no-tools, --tools, --thinking, --extension, --no-extensions,
  --skill, --no-skills, --prompt-template, --no-prompt-templates,
  --theme, --no-themes, --export, --models — with value assertions

- ts_parity_short_flags_match: validates -c (continue), -p (print),
  -e (extension), -r (resume) short flag aliases

- ts_parity_subcommands: validates install, remove, update, list,
  config subcommands are parseable

- ts_parity_at_file_expansion: validates @readme.md is split into
  file_args vs message_args correctly

- ts_parity_list_models_optional_search: validates --list-models
  with and without optional search term

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
